brush hair.global_description: A person holds a brush and moves it through their hair.
brush hair.local_description: Objects: hair, hair brush, hand Cues: repetitive strokes, object contact, upward strokes, hand gripping brush State change: reach for brush with hand; position brush at hair roots; stroke brush through hair length

catch.global_description: A person extends arms to receive and grasp a thrown object.
catch.local_description: Objects: ball, glove, hands Cues: hands forward, eyes tracking, object in air, grasping contact State change: object approaches in air; arms reach toward object; hands close around object

chew.global_description: A person's jaw moves rhythmically while holding food in their mouth.
chew.local_description: Objects: chew, food, mouth Cues: jaw up-down motion, cheek bulging, mouth closed, rhythmic pattern State change: food placed in mouth; jaw begins rhythmic motion; swallowing or pause

clap.global_description: A person brings both palms together repeatedly.
clap.local_description: Objects: clap, hands, palms Cues: symmetric motion, contact sound, rhythmic timing, forward movement State change: arms raise to chest level; palms meet with force; hands separate briefly

climb.global_description: A person ascends using hands and feet on rungs.
climb.local_description: Objects: climb, ladder, rungs Cues: upward motion, alternating limbs, gripping contact, body tension State change: reaching for next rung; pulling body upward; securing footing

climb stairs.global_description: A person ascends steps by lifting feet alternately.
climb stairs.local_description: Objects: climb, stairs, steps Cues: upward motion, alternating steps, alternating foot placement, hand contact optional State change: foot lifts onto first step; weight shifts as other foot follows; repeating pattern continues upward
state_change: weight shifts as other foot follows

dive.global_description: A person leaps headfirst into a body of water.
dive.local_description: Objects: dive, water, pool Cues: headfirst descent, arms extended forward, body streamlined, splash on entry State change: crouch or run-up preparation; jump with arms leading; submerge into water

draw_sword.global_description: A person pulls a sword from its sheath with one hand.
draw_sword.local_description: Objects: draw, sword, sheath Cues: body rotation, object contact, upward motion, grip contact State change: hand reaches toward sword hilt; sword slides out of sheath; sword held ready in hand

dribble.global_description: A player bounces a basketball repeatedly with one hand while moving.
dribble.local_description: Objects: dribble, basketball, player Cues: ball contact, rhythmic motion, forward movement, hand control State change: hand pushes ball downward; ball bounces off floor; hand meets ball on return

drink.global_description: A person lifts a container to their mouth and swallows liquid.
drink.local_description: Objects: drink, cup, glass Cues: hand-to-mouth motion, head tilted back, liquid visible, container contact State change: hand grasps container near mouth; container tilts toward face; throat movement indicates swallowing

fall floor.global_description: A person loses balance and collapses onto a floor surface.
fall floor.local_description: Objects: fall, floor, ground Cues: sudden descent, loss of balance, body contact with floor, uncontrolled motion State change: person wobbling or stumbling; body dropping toward floor; body lying on floor surface

flic flac.global_description: A person performs a backward handspring with hands and feet touching the ground in.
flic flac.local_description: Objects: flic, flac, hands Cues: backward motion, arched body, hand contact, feet contact State change: Start with hands raised and body leaning; Push off with feet and swing legs; Land on hands then feet in a
state_change: Start with hands raised and body leaning
Push off with feet and swing legs
Land on hands then feet in a

handstand.global_description: A person balances upside down on their hands with legs extended upward.
handstand.local_description: Objects: handstand, hands, arms Cues: ground contact, vertical inversion, hand-floor contact, extended legs State change: initial hand placement on ground; legs lift upward to vertical; balanced inverted hold

hug.global_description: Two people wrap arms around each other's upper body.
hug.local_description: Objects: hug, arms, upper body Cues: two-person contact, facing each other, upper body contact, arms encircling State change: arms begin to extend forward; arms wrap around upper torso; brief hold with upper body contact
state_change: brief hold with upper body contact

jump.global_description: A person propels upward off the ground with both feet leaving the surface.
jump.local_description: Objects: jump, feet, ground Cues: upward motion, both feet off ground, brief airborne moment, landing contact State change: bending knees and preparing to push off; feet leaving ground with body in air; landing with feet making contact
state_change: bending knees and preparing to push off
feet leaving ground with body in air

kiss.global_description: Two people press their lips together briefly.
kiss.local_description: Objects: kiss, face, lips Cues: two-person contact, forward lean, eye contact, lip contact State change: Heads tilt toward each other; Lips make soft contact; Heads pull back slightly

pullup.global_description: A person grips an overhead bar and pulls their body upward until their chin.
pullup.local_description: Objects: pullup, hands, arms Cues: ground contact, vertical upward motion, grip contact with bar, chin above bar State change: initial hanging position with arms extended; pulling upward with elbow flexion; chin clearing bar at peak position
state_change: initial hanging position with arms extended
chin clearing bar at peak position

punch.global_description: A person's fist moves rapidly forward to strike a target.
punch.local_description: Objects: punch, fist, arm Cues: punch motion, forward motion, arm extension, fist contact State change: arm draws back with fist clenched; torso rotates as arm accelerates forward; fist makes impact with target
state_change: arm draws back with fist clenched
torso rotates as arm accelerates forward

push.global_description: A person extends arms to move an object away from their body.
push.local_description: Objects: push, hands, arms Cues: forward motion, contact maintained, arms extended, body leaning State change: arms bend close to body; hands make contact with object; arms extend pushing object forward

ride_bike.global_description: A person sits on a bicycle seat, pedaling with both feet while holding handlebars.
ride_bike.local_description: Objects: ride, bike, bicycle Cues: mounted posture, forward motion, upright posture, feet on pedals State change: mounting bicycle and placing feet on pedals; pedaling with alternating leg motion; steering with handlebars while maintaining balance
state_change: mounting bicycle and placing feet on pedals
steering with handlebars while maintaining balance

ride horse.global_description: A person sits on a horse, holding reins while moving.
ride horse.local_description: Objects: ride, horse, saddle Cues: mounted posture, upright posture, forward motion, legs gripping State change: mounting horse from side; riding with steady gait; dismounting by swinging leg over

shake_hands.global_description: Two people grasp each other's right hands and move them up and down.
shake_hands.local_description: Objects: shake, hands, hand Cues: two-person contact, right hand dominant, reciprocal motion, brief contact State change: arms extend forward with palms open; hands clasp with firm grip; hands pump up and down 1-3 times
state_change: arms extend forward with palms open
hands pump up and down 1-3 times

shoot_bow.global_description: A person draws and releases a bowstring to propel an arrow.
shoot_bow.local_description: Objects: shoot, bow, arrow Cues: two-handed grip, arm extended forward, eye alignment, string tension State change: nocking arrow on string; drawing bowstring back; releasing arrow forward

situp.global_description: A person lies on their back and raises their torso to a seated position.
situp.local_description: Objects: situp, floor, mat Cues: ground contact, back on ground, torso vertical, hands near head State change: lying supine with knees bent; curling torso upward using abdominal muscles; reaching seated position with torso upright
state_change: curling torso upward using abdominal muscles
reaching seated position with torso upright

stand.global_description: A person's body is vertical with feet on the ground and no other support.
stand.local_description: Objects: stand, feet, ground Cues: vertical posture, feet contact, stable balance, upright orientation State change: feet planted on surface; body rises to vertical; maintains upright stillness

sword.global_description: A person swings a sword through the air.
sword.local_description: Objects: sword, hand, arm Cues: body rotation, object contact, two-handed grip, forward thrust State change: raising sword above shoulder; swinging blade in arc; following through with momentum

sword exercise.global_description: A person swings a sword through deliberate, controlled motions.
sword exercise.local_description: Objects: sword, exercise, training uniform Cues: body rotation, object contact, two-handed grip, forward stance State change: starting stance with sword raised; executing a downward or horizontal cut; returning to guard position
state_change: executing a downward or horizontal cut

throw.global_description: Arm swings back then forward, releasing object into air.
throw.local_description: Objects: throw, ball, rock Cues: overhand motion, forward trajectory, hand release, arm extension State change: arm draws back behind body; arm accelerates forward; object releases from hand

turn.global_description: A person rotates their torso and shoulders to change facing direction.
turn.local_description: Objects: turn, torso, shoulders Cues: rotational motion, upper body twist, weight shift, direction change State change: initial facing forward stance; torso rotation with shoulder alignment; complete facing new direction

walk.global_description: A person moves forward by alternating leg strides.
walk.local_description: Objects: walk, legs, feet Cues: forward motion, upright posture, arm swing, foot contact State change: leg lifts off ground; leg swings forward; foot lands ahead

wave.global_description: A person moves their hand side-to-side with palm facing outward.
wave.local_description: Objects: wave, hand, arm Cues: side-to-side motion, palm outward, arm extended, repetitive State change: arm raises with hand open; hand sweeps horizontally; arm lowers to rest

fencing.global_description: Two opponents lunge and parry with thin swords while wearing protective gear.
fencing.local_description: Objects: fencer, foil sword, mask Cues: forward lunge, blade contact, en garde stance, rapid footwork State change: en garde stance with sword raised; lunge forward with arm extended; parry opponent's blade with circular motion
state_change: en garde stance with sword raised
parry opponent's blade with circular motion

kick.global_description: A person swings their leg forward to strike an object with their foot.
kick.local_description: Objects: kick, foot, ball Cues: kick motion, forward swing, foot contact, leg extension State change: Leg lifts backward with knee bent; Leg swings forward rapidly toward object; Foot makes contact, propelling object away
state_change: Leg lifts backward with knee bent
Leg swings forward rapidly toward object
Foot makes contact, propelling object away

kick ball.global_description: A person swings their leg to strike a ball with their foot.
kick ball.local_description: Objects: kick, ball, foot Cues: kick motion, forward swing, foot contact, ball propulsion State change: leg draws back in preparation; foot makes contact with ball; leg follows through after impact

pick.global_description: A hand reaches toward and grasps an object, lifting it from a surface.
pick.local_description: Objects: pick, hand, fingers Cues: downward reach, grip contact, upward lift, object separation State change: hand extends toward object; fingers close around object; object lifts from surface

pour.global_description: A person tilts a container to transfer liquid into another vessel.
pour.local_description: Objects: pour, hand, container Cues: tilting motion, liquid flow, hand grip State change: hand grasps container; container tilts and liquid pours; container returns upright

pushup.global_description: A person lowers and raises their body using their arms while keeping their body.
pushup.local_description: Objects: pushup, floor, hands Cues: ground contact, body straight, elbows bending, chest lowering State change: starting in plank position with arms extended; lowering body until chest nears the floor; pushing back up to starting position
state_change: starting in plank position with arms extended
lowering body until chest nears the floor
pushing back up to starting position

run.global_description: A person moves rapidly with alternating leg strides and arm swings.
run.local_description: Objects: run, athlete, runner Cues: forward motion, bouncing gait, rapid pace, body leaning State change: legs push off ground; mid-air stride with opposite leg forward; foot lands and prepares next push
state_change: mid-air stride with opposite leg forward
foot lands and prepares next push

sit.global_description: A person bends their knees and lowers their torso onto a surface.
sit.local_description: Objects: sit, chair, bench Cues: downward motion, bent knees, torso contact, upright posture State change: person standing upright; person bending knees and leaning back; person's torso resting on surface with legs
state_change: person bending knees and leaning back
person's torso resting on surface with legs

smoke.global_description: A person holds a cigarette to their mouth and inhales smoke.
smoke.local_description: Objects: smoke, cigarette, lighter Cues: hand to mouth, inhaling motion, smoke exhale, holding cigarette State change: hand brings cigarette to mouth; inhales with lips on cigarette; exhales smoke cloud from mouth

talk.global_description: A person faces another with mouth moving and gestures.
talk.local_description: Objects: talk, mouth, hands Cues: facing forward, mouth open, hand gestures, eye contact State change: person turns toward another; mouth moves with speech sounds; hands gesture while speaking
